inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled for business purposes

inputs.label: Reimbursement Rate (€/km)
inputs.businessContext: Rate per kilometer as per company policy or tax authority

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate per kilometer as per company policy or tax authority
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirket politikası veya vergi dairesine göre kilometre başına oran
businessContext_i18n.de: Satz pro Kilometer gemäß Unternehmensrichtlinie oder Steuerbehörde
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux par kilomètre selon la politique de l'entreprise ou l'administration fiscale
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa por kilómetro según la política de la empresa o la autoridad fiscal
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعدل لكل كيلومتر وفقًا لسياسة الشركة أو السلطة الضريبية

inputs.businessContext: Total toll fees paid during the trip

businessContext_i18n.en: Total toll fees paid during the trip
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat sırasında ödenen toplam köprü ve otoyol ücretleri
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des frais de péage payés pendant le trajet
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de peajes pagados durante el viaje

businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des frais de stationnement engagés
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de tarifas de aparcamiento incurridas

inputs.label: Flat Allowance (€)
inputs.businessContext: Any fixed allowance for the trip (e.g., meal per diem included in mileage claim)

businessContext_i18n.en: Any fixed allowance for the trip (e.g., meal per diem included in mileage claim)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat için herhangi bir sabit ödenek (örneğin, kilometre talebine dahil edilen günlük yemek ücreti)
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Zulage für die Fahrt (z. B. Verpflegungspauschale in der Kilometerabrechnung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Toute indemnité fixe pour le trajet (par exemple, indemnité repas incluse dans la demande de remboursement kilométrique)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier subsidio fijo para el viaje (p. ej., dieta incluida en la reclamación de kilometraje)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي بدل ثابت للرحلة (مثل بدل الوجبة اليومي المضمن في مطالبة الأميال)
